attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_WSH_CARRIER_SERVICES)

attributes.Sql Query:

FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_WSH_CARRIER_SERVICES STG_CG1_WSH_CARRIER_SERVICES,
 (
 select CARRIER_SERVICE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_WSH_CARRIER_SERVICES
 minus
 select CARRIER_SERVICE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_WSH_CARRIER_SERVICES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CARRIER_SERVICE_ID = STG_CG1_WSH_CARRIER_SERVICES.CARRIER_SERVICE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_WSH_CARRIER_SERVICES.REFRESH_DATETIME
